en: Steady love, steady love The way that he looks at me
When he holds my hand He wants everyone to know
I'm his woman and he is my man We can talk about anything
ko: 나는 그의 여자이고 그는 나의 남자라는 걸

en: He's got nothing to hide He's not afraid of his feelings
He's not a slave to his pride He's giving me love
So steady He touches my heart
Now I'm ready He touches my soul
And my spirit He's giving me love
So steady, so steady Steady love
